summary: The test suite is exceptional, demonstrating a sophisticated two-tier approach. It includes a comprehensive Bats-core suite (23 tests) for unit/integration logic and a robust 'act' harness for end-to-end pipeline validation. The agent successfully navigated the complex requirement of running all tests through a GitHub Actions workflow, implementing exact-match assertions on containerized output. Coverage includes core logic, CLI error handling, multiple output formats (JSON/Markdown), and meta-tests for workflow structure and actionlint compliance.
